description: During a routine data quality review of the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024), the Clinical Data Manager identified three subjects with incorrect demographic data that must be corrected to match their source documents. Login to OpenClinica with username 'root' and password 'Admin123!' and ensure the Phase II Diabetes Trial is the active study. Update the demographic records for subject DM-101 to Gender: Male, subject DM-102 to Date of Birth: June 22, 1958 (1958-06-22), and subject DM-103 to Gender: Female and Date of Birth: December 3, 1975 (1975-12-03). Do not modify any other subjects' data or any other fields for these three subjects.
